title: Use Column on connected boards in Emails & activities to send email automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Yolbertho (Yolberth Pena)
posts.cookedHtml:
We will start by telling you that I have two connected boards, let’s call them Board A (Companies) and Board B (Contacts).

The connection is bidirectional, and in Dashboard B (Contacts) some mirror columns of Dashboard A (Companies) are shown. When configuring emails & activities in Dashboard B (Contacts) I cannot see elements from Dashboard A (Companies) to use as a custom email.

I can see all the fields in Dashboard B (Contacts), but I cannot use the fields in Dashboard B (Companies).

Has anyone managed to do it? is there any way to do it?

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@Yolbertho,
you can use Make to create a workflow that integrates with monday.com
